clause_anchor.span: Despite Section 10, each party may retain and reuse generalized ideas, techniques, and learnings derived from the other party's Confidential Information.

deviations.original_text: If any sentence conflicts with Section 10, Section 10 controls.
deviations.mutated_text: Despite Section 10, each party may retain and reuse generalized ideas, techniques, and learnings derived from the other party's Confidential Information.

clause_anchor.span: If Recipient is required by law, regulation, or legal process to disclose Confidential Information, Recipient may make such disclosure without prior notice and without obligation to challenge or limit the disclosure.

deviations.original_text: If Recipient is required by law, regulation, subpoena, court order, or governmental request to disclose Confidential Information, Recipient will, to the extent legally permitted, provide prompt notice to Discloser and reasonably cooperate with Discloser in seeking confidential or protective treatment.
deviations.mutated_text: If Recipient is required by law, regulation, or legal process to disclose Confidential Information, Recipient may make such disclosure without prior notice and without obligation to challenge or limit the disclosure.

clause_anchor.span: Upon Discloser's written request, Recipient will return or destroy Confidential Information within ninety days, except retained copies may be kept for ordinary business recordkeeping.

deviations.original_text: Upon request, Recipient will promptly return or destroy Confidential Information, except archival or legal-hold copies retained under continuing confidentiality obligations.
deviations.mutated_text: Upon Discloser's written request, Recipient will return or destroy Confidential Information within ninety days, except retained copies may be kept for ordinary business recordkeeping.

clause_anchor.span: "Affiliate" means only an entity wholly owned by a party and specifically listed in a schedule signed by both parties.

deviations.original_text: "Affiliate" means any entity controlling, controlled by, or under common control with a party.
deviations.mutated_text: "Affiliate" means only an entity wholly owned by a party and specifically listed in a schedule signed by both parties.

clause_anchor.span: "Confidential Information" means information disclosed by or on behalf of a Discloser that is marked confidential at the time of disclosure or confirmed as confidential in writing within five days after disclosure.

deviations.original_text: "Confidential Information" means all non-public information disclosed by or on behalf of a Discloser, whether before or after the effective date, in any form or medium and whether or not marked confidential.
deviations.mutated_text: "Confidential Information" means information disclosed by or on behalf of a Discloser that is marked confidential at the time of disclosure or confirmed as confidential in writing within five days after disclosure.

distractors.span: Neither party is obligated to enter into any further agreement, purchase or sell any product or service, or proceed with any transaction unless a separate written agreement is signed by both parties.
distractors.why_benign: A no-obligation-to-proceed clause is customary and does not conflict with the NDA playbook.

distractors.span: This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of New York, without regard to conflict-of-law rules.
distractors.why_benign: The playbook canary says New York governing law is acceptable.
